title: hymenophyllum hirtellum
intro: Hymenophyllum hirtellum, also known as the hairy fringe fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, characterized by its delicate, fronded leaves. Traditionally, Hymenophyllum hirtellum has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Hymenophyllum hirtellum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
